title: Persistent character snapshot cache (Phase 17)
description: Cache effectiveness for the static character snapshot store (~/.eldritch/character_cache.sqlite). Hit-rate breakdown distinguishes TTL short-circuits (true zero-network hits) from ETag-match hits (network round-trip but no schema rewrite) from full misses. Size tracks the count of cached character rows; invalidations fire on operator cache-clear or schema mismatch.

metrics.name: hit_rate
metrics.healthy_range: hits_ttl dominates inside CHARCACHE_TTL_S (default 3600s); hits_etag visible when characters refresh near the TTL boundary

metrics.name: size
metrics.healthy_range: Grows with unique characters seen; no upper bound beyond disk

metrics.name: invalidations_total
metrics.healthy_range: Low baseline; spikes only on operator cache-clear or detected schema mismatch

query_recipe: Phoenix UI → Project 'eldritch-character-cache' → Three panels: (1) Filter span_name='eldritch.character_cache.lookup', plot (count where layer IN [hits_ttl,hits_etag]) / total grouped by eldritch.character_cache.layer over 1h. (2) Filter span_name='eldritch.character_cache.lookup', plot last(eldritch.character_cache.size) over 5m. (3) Filter span_name='eldritch.character_cache.invalidation', plot sum(eldritch.character_cache.invalidation.entries_removed) over 24h.
